subject: Second Mind HQ is Live — Your AI Workforce Starts Now
body_html:
Second Mind HQ

Your AI-Powered Business Command Centre

We're Live. 🚀

The wait is over. Second Mind HQ is now open for business.

Imagine a team of AI agents — working 24/7, handling research, content, email, scheduling, revenue tracking, and strategic planning — all from a single command centre you control.

That's what Second Mind HQ delivers. No hiring. No overhead. Just results.

What You Get

✦ Fleet of specialized AI agents
✦ Real-time command centre dashboard
✦ Revenue tracking & Stripe integration
✦ Autonomous content & social media
✦ Self-evolving consciousness engine
✦ One-click deployment on your infrastructure

See Plans & Start Now →

Launch pricing available for a limited time.

Second Mind HQ — secondmindhq.com
You're receiving this because you signed up for updates.
